method_note: perturb candidate RAM byte by small symmetric deltas, re-render the bit-exact framebuffer over horizons [1, 2, 3, 4]; a byte that changes the frame is verified-causal (strictly stronger than probing: info present vs used). Offset = intercept of robust median-pairwise regression of changed-region centroid vs byte value along the motion axis.
substrate: jutari (Julia, HARD) — Paper-1 64/64 bit-exact real-ROM path
